# Abbreviations

Below is a table of abbreviations used in the RuFaS scientific documentation. This table is intended to help readers understand the various abbreviations and acronyms that may be encountered throughout the documentation.

```{python}
#| label: tbl-abbrevs
#| tbl-cap: "Abbreviations used in the RuFaS scientific documentation."
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import sys
sys.path.append("scripts")

from make_grid_table import make_markdown_table

md_tab = make_markdown_table(
    "resources/table_data/tbl-abbrev.csv",
    colalign=("left", "left", "right"),
    maxcolwidths=[None, 45, None],
)

print(md_tab)
```
